$about: Reachability ratchet (engine-merge RFC §5.5). uncovered = src/** lines NOT reachable from the FACADE tier (tests/functional/**) alone. verdict: dead (remove) | gap (add a targeted facade test) | keep (layer-specific by design — covered by the layer unit tier) | TODO-triage (fails the check). Growth of any entry, or a NEW file, fails the ratchet.
